name: Gouda Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and baking soda. Stir in the shredded Gouda cheese.
2. In a small bowl, thoroughly combine the yogurt, butter, and eggs.
3. Add all at once to the dry ingredients; stir just until moistened.
4. Divide the batter evenly among 12 large greased muffin cups.
5. Bake in a preheated oven (400°F/200°C) for 18-20 minutes.
